title: BUG #18741: Detaching a partition referencing a partitioned table fails with a trigger-related error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE pt1 (a Int32, b String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE p1 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a AS SELECT * FROM pt1 WHERE a >= 0 AND a < 1;
CREATE TABLE pt2 (a Int32, c Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
CREATE TABLE p2 (a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO pt2 SELECT a, c FROM p2 WHERE c >= 0;
key_bug_features: Detaching partition with foreign key triggers fails
